_meta.philosophy: Manus AI LTM Report architecture: tiered memory (hot/warm/cold), entity extraction with slot filling, progressive summarization with importance scoring (RRI: Recency-Relevance-Importance), hybrid retrieval (keyword + semantic), user profiling with contradiction resolution. Memory survives context compaction. Single source of truth.
principles: HOT = current context window (this session's active state)
WARM = structured facts that survive compaction (this file)
COLD = git history + session_history archive (searchable, not loaded)
Compress aggressively: if it can be derived from code, don't store it
Store DECISIONS and LESSONS, not descriptions of what the code does
Every memory entry has importance_score (0-1) for retrieval ranking
Contradictions resolve in favor of LATEST entry (user changed their mind)
Entity extraction: extract people, pages, components, patterns into slots
Anti-regression: lessons_learned entries are PERMANENT guards against repeating mistakes
_meta.usage: Load at session start. Read user_profile FIRST. Check active_state for WIP. Scan lessons_learned before touching any file. Update at session end.
_meta.compaction_protocol: When context compresses: (1) read this file, (2) check active_state.checkpoint, (3) resume from pending steps, (4) do NOT re-read files already marked completed

communication_style.language: Bilingual EN/繁中, casual tone, uses 'plz' for urgency
communication_style.review_method: Screenshots from iPhone with annotations (green circles = problem areas)
communication_style.approval_signal: Silence or moving to next task = approved
communication_style.frustration_signal: Repeating same feedback = fix NOW with different approach, don't explain

decision_patterns.meaning: Previous fix failed, try completely different approach
Overshot — go subtle, 50% of what you just did
This is the problem, figure it out
Internalize deeply, build systems around it

frustration_triggers.fix: Triple-layer overflow: html + body + container, all with max-width:100% and overflow-x:hidden
Subtle +15% on body text only. NEVER touch headings, stat values, or ticker prices
Bump 9-13px text to 11-15px range. Leave 16px+ alone
If method fails twice, abandon entirely. Try opposite approach
Just do it. Ask forgiveness not permission
Use professional SVG/WebP. Generate if missing
setup_github_environment then IMMEDIATELY push. No diagnostics between

github.push_protocol: setup_github_environment → IMMEDIATELY git push (next command, no diagnostics). Token is ephemeral.

active_state.last_action: Complete KINTSUGI rebrand — 13 images, 3 pages, full i18n

lessons_learned.lesson: Always set max-width: 100% on BOTH the image AND its container, plus overflow-x: hidden on html,body. Don't rely on parent constraints trickling down.
lessons_learned.anti_pattern: .feature-img has no max-width → 900px image escapes 375px viewport
lessons_learned.fix_pattern: .feature-img { max-width: 100%; overflow: hidden } AND img { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block }

lessons_learned.lesson: Never have two competing @media blocks for the same breakpoint. The last one wins via CSS cascade and will override the first, causing unexpected size inflation.
lessons_learned.anti_pattern: MOBILE READABILITY block after MOBILE LAYOUT block → readability overrides layout sizes
lessons_learned.fix_pattern: Single @media(max-width:768px) block per page. Merge all mobile rules into one block.

lessons_learned.lesson: setup_github_environment token is ephemeral. Call setup, then git push in the VERY NEXT command. No diagnostics in between. If first method fails twice, try completely different approach.
lessons_learned.anti_pattern: Running git config checks between setup and push → token expires → auth fails
lessons_learned.fix_pattern: setup_github_environment && cd /home/user/flutter_app && git push origin main

lessons_learned.lesson: User reviews on iPhone 375px. All images must be contained within viewport. Feature images need explicit max-width on container, not just on img tag.
lessons_learned.anti_pattern: Setting width:100% on img but parent .feature-img has no width constraint
lessons_learned.fix_pattern: Both container AND img get max-width: 100%. Container also gets overflow: hidden.

lessons_learned.lesson: Font scaling must be subtle (+15% on body text, leave headings alone). 30% was too aggressive and broke layout. Only bump the small hard-to-read text (9-13px range).
lessons_learned.anti_pattern: Applying 1.3x multiplier to ALL text including headings → layout explosion
lessons_learned.fix_pattern: Only bump: nav links, body paragraphs, labels, badges, toast text. Leave alone: h1, h2, stat values, ticker prices.

lessons_learned.lesson: When user repeats the same feedback, they're frustrated. Don't explain — just fix it differently. When a method fails twice, abandon it entirely.
lessons_learned.anti_pattern: Explaining why the fix should work while user sees it doesn't
lessons_learned.fix_pattern: Acknowledge → try completely different approach → show proof (screenshot/URL)

lessons_learned.lesson: Replace emoji with professional SVG/WebP icons. User expects premium quality throughout. No placeholders in production.
All 3 pages must have matching i18n coverage (EN/ZH-TW/JP). Language persists via localStorage key 'qqb_lang' across page navigation. Event name is nw-lang-change (NOT nw-language-change).
Global catch-all * { max-width: 100vw } prevents ANY element from escaping viewport. Apply on mobile breakpoint as nuclear option.
lessons_learned.anti_pattern: Fixing individual elements one by one while new ones overflow

lessons_learned.lesson: Desktop gap values (60px) bleed into mobile if not overridden. Feature-row gap: 60px on desktop must be explicitly reduced to 20px on mobile.
lessons_learned.anti_pattern: .feature-row { gap: 60px } without mobile override → pushes content off-screen

lessons_learned.lesson: User prefers nano-banana-pro for all image generation — best realism. Always use this model unless explicitly told otherwise.

session_history.summary: Built ai-assets.html (AI Asset Manager beta page with 6 TCG agent cards, feature sections, coverage grid, beta metrics). Added SVG asset icons. Unified premium nav across qinqin/coin-shop/ai-assets. Implemented buy toast interceptor on all pages. Major mobile overflow hardening (triple-layer protection). Font scaling journey: 30% (too big) -> reverted -> 15% (still conflicting) -> single mobile block (final). Committed 43 files to GitHub.
key_decisions: TCG cards use fullbleed art with gradient overlay for text legibility
Feature images 900x502 WebP, agent cards 500x669 WebP
Triple-layer overflow: html + body + container
Font scaling: +15% body text only, single @media block, headings untouched
Buy toast shows '別急嘛～ 慢慢來' on all wallet-linked CTAs
Removed conflicting MOBILE READABILITY block from ai-assets (was overriding layout sizes)
Added global * { max-width: 100vw } catch-all for mobile
Viewport locked: user-scalable=no, maximum-scale=1.0
issues_resolved: GitHub push auth failures (ephemeral token lesson learned)
Hero h1 invisibility on mobile (gold on gold background)
